MELItem.Title: Forward Cargo Air Conditioning (FCAC) System (787-9: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A869, VN-A870, VN-A871)

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate forward cargo air conditioning system (AMM DDG 21-54-01).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag: 1
MC CARGO REFRIG UNIT LIQUID PUMP

Note.Para: The CARGO A/C FWD Advisory will be displayed.

OperationNote.Para: Forward cargo cooling is not available. Forward cargo heat operates normally. Temperature sensitive cargo that requires cooling should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details.. Set FCAC ON for forward cargo heat to operate.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be dispatched with CARGO A/C FWD LEAK fault provided FCAC is deactivated.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate forward cargo air conditioning system and locate leak and clean leaked fluids (AMM DDG 21-54-01).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag: 1
MC CARGO REFRIG UNIT LIQUID PUMP
Clean any leaked fluid from surrounding components.
Replace recirculation filters if exposed to fluid spray.

OperationNote.Para: Forward cargo cooling is not available. Forward cargo heat operates normally. Temperature sensitive cargo that requires cooling should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment. Refer the flight NOTOC for details. Set FCAC ON for forward cargo heat to operate.
